General.Name: BLAZE Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Blaze Minerals Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in Australia, Uganda, and the Republic of Congo. It explores for nickel, lithium, and gold deposits. The company holds interests in the Loulombo Project, which covers an area of 195 square kilometers located in the Republic of Congo. In addition, it holds interests in the Ntungamo Project and the Mityana Project, covering an area of 242 square kilometers located in Uganda, East Africa. The company was formerly known as Blaze International Limited and changed its name to Blaze Minerals Limited in July 2021. Blaze Minerals Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 50 Kings Park Road, West Perth, WA, Australia, 6005
